topic.date_range_guidance: Prioritise 2015-2026. Use older authoritative multiplier/method sources only where still standard.
priority_venues: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management

database_search_strings.Scopus/WoS: (construction OR infrastructure OR "built asset") AND (job* OR employ* OR workforce OR FTE OR "job-years") AND (capex OR "economic impact" OR "jobs per million")
database_search_strings.Google Scholar: "jobs per million" construction capex OR "job-years" "economic impact"
database_search_strings.Australia grey lit: site:gov.au construction jobs economic impact capex PDF

topic.topic_title: Warehouse and fulfilment centre construction and operations jobs per capex and floor area
topic.research_goal: Find citable project-level and sector-level metrics for construction and operational jobs in warehouses, logistics hubs, distribution centres, and fulfilment centres, with capex and floor area. Prioritise official economic-development announcements, planning approvals, and government sources. Known leads: Amazon Johnston RI robotics fulfilment; Baton Rouge and Shreveport LA; Carencro and Clarksville; UK HCA Employment Density Guide; BPF/Prologis logistics density. Report construction jobs, peak workforce, permanent operational jobs, capex, gross floor area vs foundation footprint, direct vs indirect scope. Minimum yield: two compatible sources per metric class.
topic.role_descriptor: expert construction economist and logistics real-estate evidence curator
subtopic_axes: fulfilment centre construction jobs per US$100M capex
warehouse operational jobs per million square feet or per 100,000 sqm
employment density sqm per FTE for B8 storage and distribution
robotics fulfilment centre projected versus realised headcount
official state economic-development project announcements with jobs and capex

search_batches.name: project_announcements
search_batches.description: Amazon, Walmart, Target, DHL, FedEx official project documents.

search_batches.name: planning_density
search_batches.description: HCA, BPF, Prologis, municipal employment-density guides.

search_batches.name: construction_workforce
search_batches.description: Construction-related jobs tied to named logistics projects.

warehouse economic impact construction jobs permanent jobs capex
